message:
refactor: migrate testing.rs from std::sync::Mutex to parking_lot::Mutex

Continues the parking_lot migration from the previous commit
(dependency.rs + coverage.rs). Removes 11 .expect("...poisoned") calls
from the test harness module, replacing std::sync::Mutex with
parking_lot::Mutex throughout the TestApp and mock infrastructure.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
